specs.title: loads, adds a widget, and the DB reflects the new arrangement
free event with no tiers renders no quantities UI
single-tier paid event renders one quantity spinner with default 1 and a live subtotal
multi-tier event renders one spinner per tier and sums the subtotal across them
sold-out tier disables the spinner at max=0

suites.title: Contacts importer — duplicate header review edge case

specs.title: duplicate Email header surfaces in review step and import proceeds with default ignore
imports 5 contacts end-to-end and lands in pending-review

suites.title: Contacts importer — PII rejection edge case

specs.title: contacts CSV with SSN-format values in an extra column is rejected
re-import with update strategy stages 5 changes and approve applies them

suites.title: Content bundle importer — live-reveal opt-in UI (session 309)

specs.title: analyzes the bundle on upload and reveals gated theme + page toggles

suites.title: Donations importer — error report edge case

specs.title: donations CSV with 5 ambiguous-email rows surfaces 5-row error table and downloads errored-rows CSV
imports 5 donations with transactions and auto-creates contacts

suites.title: Donations importer — Map Columns row indicator

specs.title: rows render incomplete by default and flip to complete when mapped
mapping select exposes a search input when opened
re-import with update strategy stages amount changes; approval applies them
imports 3 events with registrations and transactions
re-import with update strategy stages title changes; approval applies them

suites.title: Invoice-details importer — line-item ordering under update strategy

specs.title: line-item ordering is preserved for a 3+ line-item invoice group
conflicting parent-invoice fields resolve via first-row-wins
imports 6 rows into 3 transactions with grouped line items
re-import with update strategy stages line-item changes; approval applies them
imports 5 memberships and auto-creates contacts
re-import with update strategy stages notes changes; approval applies them
imports every note from the generated notes.csv and attaches each to its contact
renders both sections and surfaces snapshot counts on Export Site

specs.title: Import Site analyzes the bundle on upload and reveals gated toggles
Memos item create modal mounts QuillEditor (not Trix)
Memos item save round-trip persists Quill-authored content
toggle off baseline — op_b sees Edit and Delete on op_a-authored note
toggle on — op_b cannot see Edit / Delete on op_a-authored note
toggle on + edit_others_note granted — op_b can edit again
text_block (bg:false, content:false) renders the expected wrapper structure
text_block (bg:true,  content:false) renders the expected wrapper structure
text_block (bg:true,  content:true) renders the expected wrapper structure
hero (bg:false, content:false) renders the expected wrapper structure
hero (bg:true,  content:false) renders the expected wrapper structure
hero (bg:true,  content:true) renders the expected wrapper structure
nav (bg:false, content:false) renders the expected wrapper structure
nav (bg:true,  content:false) renders the expected wrapper structure
nav (bg:true,  content:true) renders the expected wrapper structure
normalizes (bg:false, content:true) to bg:true semantics
column-layout (bg:false, content:false) renders the expected wrapper structure
column-layout (bg:true,  content:false) renders the expected wrapper structure
column-layout (bg:true,  content:true) renders the expected wrapper structure
widget inside a column with both knobs true is still clamped to (false, false)

suites.title: Editor — column bg parity with public side

specs.title: editor renders solid bg color set via DB on a column
editor renders gradient bg set via DB on a column

suites.title: Editor — column bg vs content toggle independence

specs.title: editor (bg:false, content:false): outer container --contained iff !bg, inner grid --contained iff !content
editor (bg:true,  content:false): outer container --contained iff !bg, inner grid --contained iff !content
editor (bg:true,  content:true): outer container --contained iff !bg, inner grid --contained iff !content
body-click selects the widget (no whole-panel button needed)
the top-right Edit affordance opens the Inspector on its content tab
the overlay body is no longer a drag handle (whole-panel reorder gone)
the top-left grip reorders the widget and the new order persists

suites.title: Page builder — in-page text editing (session 304 Phase 2)

specs.title: unselected preview is pixel-clean; selecting arms the prose nodes
round-trips a nested plaintext path (columns.0.title) to raw config
round-trips a nested richtext path (columns.0.attribute_rows.0.value)
token-bearing node is editable and seeds the raw token
toolbar appears on richtext activation and disappears on outside click (§B1/§B4)
bold toggle persists to saved config (§F2.1 / §L)
corner affordances hidden while inline-editing (§C14)
link popover saves target+rel when "open in new tab" is checked (§G / §6.2)
drives the three-tab layout inspector and persists background + padding

suites.title: Per-template content scheme — three surfaces, scheme-switched

specs.title: PUBLIC default scheme = identity (content region == the Theme .np-site value)
PUBLIC inverse scheme: content region follows, chrome holds (compose-not-bleed)
ADMIN: --np-color-* tokens still do not leak into Filament
PREVIEW reverts with the scheme: default → back to the Theme value
ADMIN: --np-color-* tokens do not leak into Filament
